description: CLI gate resolution. `compose gate list` (pending gates + artifact assessment) and `compose gate resolve <id> --approve|--revise [--comment]|--kill --reason`. Wraps the existing POST /api/vision/gates/{id}/resolve endpoint. Highest-impact gap: today a headless or CI-driven build cannot clear a gate, making the cockpit a hard dependency for any gated pipeline. Ships first; unblocks autonomous/CI runs.

completions.notes: CLI gate resolution shipped via /compose lifecycle. `compose gate list` + `compose gate resolve` wrap GET/POST /api/vision/gates[/:id/resolve]; gate≡gates alias, gates report unchanged; no server changes. Unblocks headless/CI gate clearing (highest-impact UI↔CLI parity gap). Codex review CLEAN after fixing --item client-side filter (server only filters itemId on pending path) + --status/--format enum validation. 16 cli-gate tests + 40 existing gate tests green.
